reasoning_content:

The Task 3 framework already has:

The current EmitIR only handles IntegerLiteral, CompoundStmt, ReturnStmt, and FunctionDecl with no parameters. I need to add handlers for:
- DeclRefExpr
- UnaryExpr (kPos, kNeg, kNot)
- BinaryExpr (all operations)
- CallExpr
- ImplicitCastExpr (LValueToRValue, IntegralCast)
- VarDecl (with alloca)
- FunctionDecl parameters
- StringLiteral
- ParenExpr
- InitListExpr

Let me implement all of these properly.
